memes.label: "Table of Contents"
memes.description: "Contents of Armed with Madness by Mary Butts"

memes.label: "Beauty"
memes.description: "Beauty as a volatile perceptual force in Armed with Madness — at once a mode of apprehending truth, a catalyst of erotic obsession, and a surface whose fragility exposes the fractures of post-war modernist consciousness."

memes.label: "Carston"
memes.description: "He was struggling with the branch line of a remote English railway."

memes.label: "Carston and Clarence"
memes.description: "Carston’s day had been a penance."

memes.label: "I"
memes.description: "In the house, in which they could not afford to live, it was unpleasantly quiet."

memes.label: "II"
memes.description: "They woke to a clean superb day."

memes.label: "III"
memes.description: "Cool, rested, made up, she went to the station."

memes.label: "IV"
memes.description: "The morning restored Carston to kinder thoughts."

memes.label: "V"
memes.description: "Picus was alone in his room, modelling the body of Scylla in wax."

memes.label: "VI"
memes.description: "Tea was a reasonable meal, with a real human being at it, the doctor having come over from Starn to attend to Picus’s health."

memes.label: "VII"
memes.description: "They dined without Picus or Scylla."

memes.label: "VIII"
memes.description: "The morning was a merciful bustle, with Ross’s promise come true of the freshest earth there is."

memes.label: "IX"
memes.description: "At a choice of tracks apparently parallel and similar, Picus had led them to the left."

memes.label: "X"
memes.description: "The next morning the sky was white round a blue zenith."

memes.label: "XI"
memes.description: "Picus and Scylla went out of the house along the green road, walking separately."

memes.label: "XII"
memes.description: "After an accident in the sea with a small octopus he would sooner have avoided, Carston returned to the house."

memes.label: "XIII"
memes.description: "Scylla went upstairs, and lying on her bed in her shift felt her elation and clean fatigue replaced by shabby weariness and fear."

memes.label: "XIV"
memes.description: "As Felix said, “pep” had been the*mot juste*for the way Carston behaved."

memes.label: "XV"
memes.description: "At Starn he was refreshed again with contacts from outside."

memes.label: "XVI"
memes.description: "Next morning Carston was by no means in the same mind, and hardly in the same body."

memes.label: "XVII"
memes.description: "Clarence figured it out."

memes.label: "XVIII"
memes.description: "“Tired,” said Scylla, changing her dress, and leaving that to stare out at the wood—“Tired of your wretched beauty, your rearrangements of light on a leaf.”  “Bored,” said Picus, who had gone to me..."

memes.label: "XIX"
memes.description: "It was perceptibly cooler, stale-cool, uneasy air-threads stirring in the straight wood drive."

memes.label: "XX"
memes.description: "Breakfast reassured him how far they minded the weather."

memes.label: "Clarence"
memes.description: "At the cottage on Tollerdown, Clarence began a call to order."

memes.label: "Clarence and Scylla"
memes.description: "Scylla slept at Starn."

memes.label: "Colophon"
memes.description: "*Armed with Madness* was published in1928by Mary Butts."

memes.label: Concepts
memes.description: Alphabetical index of all concepts and themes explored in Armed with Madness.

memes.label: Dream
memes.description: Dreams and oneiric states in Armed with Madness function as a portal to the unconscious, revealing characters' hidden desires, fears, and mythic connections that surface when rational consciousness subsides.

memes.label: Events
memes.description: Alphabetical index of all significant events in Armed with Madness.

memes.label: "Felix"
memes.description: "Felix bolted black and stormy to his hotel and emerged again into the gold light, fresh as roses."

memes.label: "Felix"
memes.description: "Felix sobbed in the taxi: “Can’t you see we are all damned.” And that love and death were one."

memes.label: God
memes.description: The concept of gods and the divine in Armed with Madness reflects the novel's pagan revivalist sensibility, where ancient deities persist as active presences in the modern English landscape and psyche.

memes.label: Hospitality
memes.description: Hospitality in Armed with Madness is the primary social dynamic governing relationships at Gault House — a complex economy of giving and receiving that binds the characters together while generating tensions of class, obligation, and resentment.

memes.label: "Imprint"
memes.description: "This ebook is the product of many hours of hard work by volunteers forStandard Ebooks, and builds on the hard work of other literature lovers made possible by the public domain."

memes.label: "In and Out"
memes.description: "On his way down the drive Carston knew what you did."

memes.label: "Joy (Lapis Exultationis)"
memes.description: "Picus's private reimagining of the Grail as the 'stone of joy' (lapis exultationis) — a fugitive concept in Armed with Madness that traces the modernist transposition of sacred myth into aesthetic-erotic experience, where joy must be 'allowed,' 'managed,' and is always something that flies."

memes.label: "Lydia"
memes.description: "She was alone next morning."

memes.label: "Mr. Tracy"
memes.description: "Carston spent the next morning thinking about oldMr.Tracy, or, more exactly, how he would hate to walk up his drive."

memes.label: Myth
memes.description: The role of mythological patterns, archetypes, and sacred narratives in Armed with Madness.

memes.label: Nature
memes.description: Nature in Armed with Madness is not a passive backdrop but an active, animate presence — a realm of wildness, pattern, and pagan vitality that stands in opposition to the disenchanted rationality of post-war modernity.

memes.label: Objects
memes.description: Alphabetical index of all significant objects and artifacts in Armed with Madness.

memes.label: Pagan Revival
memes.description: The early twentieth-century cultural movement of renewed interest in pre-Christian religions, as reflected in Armed with Madness.

memes.label: "Picus"
memes.description: "On the same night Picus went out, also alone and in a clearing among trees."

memes.label: Places
memes.description: Alphabetical index of all locations and places in Armed with Madness.

memes.label: "Ross"
memes.description: "Ross finished the drawing of a plant that grew in whorls and spirals and tendrils and bracts."

memes.label: Sacrifice
memes.description: Sacrifice in Armed with Madness bridges pagan ritual practice and psychological self-giving, appearing as both a literal earth-offering and a metaphor for the costs of love and war.

memes.label: "Scylla"
memes.description: "She arrived in London at the time when all reasonable citizens are trying to leave it, and the place seems fuller than ever."

memes.label: Sleep
memes.description: Sleep in Armed with Madness is a threshold state of vulnerability and intimacy where characters shed their waking defenses, and the boundary between conscious identity and unconscious desire becomes permeable.

memes.label: "The Game"
memes.description: "In Armed with Madness, 'the Game' is the circle's self-conscious social practice of parlor psychoanalysis, aestheticised repartee, and ritualised role-playing that structures life at Gault House — both as liberation into sacred play and as evasion from authentic confrontation."

memes.label: "The Sanc-Grail"
memes.description: "A greenish glass dish discovered in a well on the downs, believed by the Gault House circle to be the Holy Grail — functioning as both a physical object of obsessive pursuit and the novel's central symbol of spiritual longing, collective delusion, and the modern failure of myth."

memes.label: "The Storm"
memes.description: "The storms that punctuate the narrative of Mary Butts's Armed with Madness — functioning as both literal weather events that shape the physical world of Gault House and symbolic markers of psychological upheaval, erotic tension, and the boundary between the human and the elemental."

memes.label: "The Wood"
memes.description: The enchanted wood that surrounds Gault House, personified as a conscious, equivocal presence that must be appeased and which mediates between the natural and the supernatural in *Armed with Madness*.

memes.label: Transformation
memes.description: The theme of personal transformation and metamorphosis in Armed with Madness — how characters change through encounter, crisis, and revelation.

memes.label: "Uncopyright"
memes.description: "> May you do good and not evil."

memes.label: Water
memes.description: Water in Armed with Madness is the primary elemental symbol, appearing as the well's sacred source, the encircling sea, and the tidal creeks that define the Dorset landscape — a medium of transformation, purification, and mythic connection.

memes.label: "When We Were Very Young"
memes.description: "While Felix was whirling down from Montmartre in a taxi with the boy friend and the Russian, all of them drunk."
